title: Write numbers in written form
description: Practice working with whole numbers in written form. For example, "one thousand four hundred three" is the written form of 1403.
topic_path: Writing whole numbers in written form

assessment_items.question_content:
**What is "fifty thousand, six hundred thirty-one" in standard form?**

[[☃ numeric-input 1]]
hints:
Let's use a place value chart to write $\tealD{\text{fifty thousand,}} \blueD{\text{ six hundred}} \purpleC{\text{ thirty-}}\greenD{\text{one}}$ in standard form.

Ten thousands | Thousands | Hundreds | Tens |  Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-:
$\tealD5$ | $\tealD0$| $\blueD6$ | $\purpleC3$ | $\greenD1$
"Fifty thousand, six hundred thirty-one" in standard form is $50{,}631$.

assessment_items.question_content:
**What is $82{,}605$ in words?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
Let's break our number into parts:  $\blueD{82}{,}\greenD{605}$

$\blueD{\text{Eighty-two thousand}}$ is to the left of the comma.

$\greenD{\text{Six hundred five}}$ is to the right of the comma. 

Now, let's combine the parts.
$82{,}605$ is written as eighty-two thousand, six hundred five.

choices.content: Eighty thousand, two hundred sixty five

assessment_items.question_content:
**What is $3{,}079$ in words?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
Let's break our number into parts:  $\blueD{3}{,}\greenD{079}$

$\blueD{\text{Three thousand}}$ is to the left of the comma.

$\greenD{\text{Seventy-nine}}$ is to the right of the comma. 

Now, let's combine the parts.
$3{,}079$ is written as three thousand, seventy-nine.

assessment_items.question_content:
**What is $210{,}388$ in words?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
Let's break our number into parts:  $\blueD{210}{,}\greenD{388}$

$\blueD{\text{Two hundred ten thousand}}$ is to the left of the comma.

$\greenD{\text{Three hundred eighty-eight}}$ is to the right of the comma. 

Now, let's combine the parts.
$210{,}388$ is written as two hundred ten thousand, three hundred eighty-eight.

choices.content: Two hundred thirteen thousand, eight hundred eighty
Two hundred ten thousand, three hundred eighty-eight

"Fifty-two thousand, nine hundred seventy" in standard form is $52{,}970$.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Match the written form and expanded form that describe the same number.**

[[☃ matcher 1]]
hints:
Let's look at each written form one at a time.  

$\blueD{\text{Three hundred}} \purpleC{\text{ sixty-}} \greenD{\text{eight}} =\blueD{300}+\purpleC{60}+\greenD8$
$\redD{\text{Three thousand,}} \blueD{\text{ six hundred }} \greenD{\text{eight}} =\redD{3{,}000}+\blueC{600}+\greenD8$
$\tealD{\text{Thirty thousand,}} \blueD{\text{ six hundred }} \purpleC{\text{eighty}} =\tealD{30{,}000}+\blueC{600}+\purpleC{80}$

The answer:

Written form | Expanded form
:-: | :-: 
Three hundred sixty-eight | $300+60+8$
Three thousand, six hundred eight | $3{,}000+600+8$
Thirty thousand, six hundred eighty| $30{,}000+600+80$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Match the written form and expanded form that describe the same number.**

[[☃ matcher 1]]
hints:
Let's look at each written form one at a time.  

$\redD{\text{Four thousand,}} \purpleC{\text{ seventy-}} \greenD{\text{seven}} =\redD{4{,}000}+\purpleC{70}+\greenD7$
$ \blueD{\text{Four hundred }} \greenD{\text{seven}} =\blueC{400}+\greenD7$
$\tealD{\text{Forty thousand,}} \blueD{\text{ seven hundred}} =\tealD{40{,}000}+\blueC{700}$

The answer:

Written form | Expanded form
:-: | :-: | -
Four thousand, seventy-seven | $4{,}000+70+7$
Four hundred seven | $400+7$
Forty thousand, seven hundred | $40{,}000+700$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Match the written form and expanded form that describe the same number.**

[[☃ matcher 1]]
hints:
Let's look at each written form one at a time.  

$\tealD{\text{Eighty thousand,}}\blueD{\text{ nine hundred}} \purpleC{\text{ eighty}}  =\tealD{\text{80{,}000}}+\blueD{900}+\purpleC{80}$
$\redD{\text{Eight thousand,}} \purpleC{\text{ ninety-}}\greenD{\text{eight}} =\redD{8{,}000}+\purpleC{90}+\greenD{8}$
$\redD{\text{Eight thousand,}} \blueD{\text{ nine hundred }}\greenD{\text{eight}} =\redD{8{,}000}+\blueD{900}+\greenD{8}$

The answer:

Written form | Expanded form
:-: | :-: 
Eighty thousand, nine hundred eighty | $80{,}000+900+80$
Eight thousand, ninety-eight | $8{,}000+90+8$
Eight thousand, nine hundred eight | $8{,}000+900+8$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Match the written form and expanded form that describe the same number.**

[[☃ matcher 1]]
hints:
Let's look at each written form one at a time.  

$\blueD{\text{Two hundred}} \purpleC{\text{ twenty}}  =\blueD{200}+\purpleC{20}$
$\tealD{\text{Twenty-}} \redD{\text{two thousand,}} \greenD{\text{ two}} =\tealD{20{,}000}+\redD{2{,}000}+\greenD{2}$
$\redD{\text{Two thousand,}} \purpleC{\text{ twenty}}  =\redD{2{,}000}+\purpleC{20}$

The answer:

Written form | Expanded form
:-: | :-: 
Two hundred twenty | $200+20$
Twenty-two thousand, two | $20{,}000+2{,}000+2$
Two thousand, twenty | $2{,}000+20$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Match the written form and expanded form that describe the same number.**

[[☃ matcher 1]]
hints:
Let's look at each written form one at a time.  

$\blueD{\text{Five hundred}} \purpleC{\text{ forty-}} \greenD{\text{one}} =\blueD{500}+\purpleC{40}+\greenD1$
$\tealD{\text{Fifty-}} \redD{\text{four thousand,}} \blueD{\text{ one hundred}} =\tealD{50{,}000}+\redD{4{,}000}+\blueD{100}$
$\tealD{\text{Fifty thousand,}} \blueD{\text{ four hundred}} \greenD{\text{ one}}=\tealD{50{,}000}+\blueD{400}+\greenD{1}$

The answer:

Written form | Expanded form
:-: | :-: 
Five hundred forty-one | $500+40+1$
Fifty-four thousand, one hundred | $50{,}000+4,000+100$
Fifty thousand, four hundred one | $50{,}000+400+1$
